_comment: Structured registry of EXTERNAL assets used directly in the build. Every entry MUST have a license + attribution + sourceUrl. Validated by tools/validate-assets.js; human-readable mirror in ASSET_CREDITS.md. Procedural (code-drawn) art is NOT listed here — it has no external license.

assets.source: Universal LPC Spritesheet Generator (Liberated Pixel Cup)
assets.modifications: Sliced into directional walk frames; ember-skeleton variant is an orange multiply recolor.
